questionHtml: Given that the length of each road shown on the graph is given to the nearest kilometre, find the lower bound for the total distance in the optimal solution.
markschemeHtml:
recognize 7 edges in optimum route         (M1)

Note: Award M1 for a total length of 52 seen.

 

subtracting 0.5× edges from 52         (M1)

52-7×0.5

=48.5 (km)          A1

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: Given that the length of each road shown on the graph is given to the nearest kilometre, find the lower bound for the total distance in the optimal solution.
